data.title: T-Mobile's Customer Growth Outpaces Verizon, AT&T Combined: Analysts Raise Forecasts
data.description: T-Mobile reported strong Q3 results, with service revenue growth of 5.1% and higher-than-expected postpaid phone net additions. Analysts maintain positive ratings with raised price targets.

data.title: Tech Stocks Rebound With Tesla Soaring To Best Day Since March 2021, Gold Rises As Treasury Yields Ease: What's Driving Markets Thursday?
data.description: Tech stocks outperformed on Thursday, driven by Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA), which skyrocketed 18% in midday trading following stronger-than-expected quarterly financial results.

data.title: Decoding Citigroup's Options Activity: What's the Big Picture?
What's Going On With Lear Shares Thursday?
data.description: Lear reported earnings for the 2024 third-quarter before the market opened.
